title: WhatsApp automation for booking and launch notification buttons

requirements.summary: Add WhatsApp booking automation to all booking CTA buttons across subsidiary sections
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking any booking CTA button opens a new tab with a WhatsApp chat URL (https://wa.me/<number>?text=...)
The pre-filled message includes the name of the selected service or subsidiary
The pre-filled message includes a placeholder or prompt for the preferred date and time
The WhatsApp number used matches the existing Footer contact number
All booking buttons across AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, and GSTServicesSection trigger this behavior

file_operations.description: Extract the existing WhatsApp phone number into a constant that can be imported by other components to ensure consistency across all WhatsApp links

Replace the existing CTA button's smooth-scroll behavior with a WhatsApp link that opens wa.me in a new tab with a pre-filled message including 'Assured Tours & Travels' and a prompt for preferred date/time. Import the WhatsApp number from Footer to maintain consistency

Replace the existing CTA button's smooth-scroll behavior with a WhatsApp link that opens wa.me in a new tab with a pre-filled message including 'Luminia Captures Photography' and a prompt for preferred date/time. Import the WhatsApp number from Footer to maintain consistency

Replace the existing CTA button's smooth-scroll behavior with a WhatsApp link that opens wa.me in a new tab with a pre-filled message including 'Luminia TechLabs' and a prompt for preferred date/time. Import the WhatsApp number from Footer to maintain consistency

Replace the existing CTA button's smooth-scroll behavior with a WhatsApp link that opens wa.me in a new tab with a pre-filled message including 'GST Services' and a prompt for preferred date/time. Import the WhatsApp number from Footer to maintain consistency

requirements.summary: Add WhatsApp notification automation to 'Notify Me' buttons for upcoming brands in ComingSoonSection
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Notify Me' button for a coming-soon brand opens WhatsApp in a new tab
The pre-filled message includes the specific brand name the user selected
The pre-filled message clearly states intent to be notified of that brand's launch
The WhatsApp number used matches the existing Footer contact number
All three Notify Me buttons (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) trigger this behavior with their respective brand names

file_operations.description: Update all three 'Notify Me' buttons to open WhatsApp (wa.me) in a new tab with pre-filled messages stating the user wants to be notified about the launch of the specific brand (Luminia Gadgets, Moda Vestra, or Velocity Vogue). Import the WhatsApp number from Footer to maintain consistency. Ensure each button includes the correct brand name in its message
